# Fusion Health Juice Bar

Fusion Health Juice Bar is a Hartford, CT juice bar serving fresh juices, smoothies, green juices, wellness shots, acai bowls, sea moss drinks, Jamaican-inspired drinks, and a signature Peanut Punch.

Business name: Fusion Health Juice Bar
Address: 879 New Britain Ave, Hartford, CT 06106
Phone: (860) 461-0575
Website: https://fusionhealthjuices.com

Menu highlights include Peanut Punch, Greenobrett green juice, Green Day Smoothie, Banana Strawberry Smoothie, Immune Boost, Hard Rak Shake, fresh fruit juices, wellness blends, sea moss drinks, immune shots, acai bowls, Jamaican patties, and customizable add-ins.

Fusion Health Juice Bar serves Hartford, West Hartford, New Britain, Wethersfield, East Hartford, Bloomfield, Windsor, Manchester, and nearby Connecticut communities.

Wellness ingredients featured across the menu include peanut, sea moss, kale, spinach, celery, cucumber, ginger, moringa, turmeric, ashwagandha, chia seeds, flaxseeds, ginseng, maca, pumpkin seeds, bee pollen, aloe vera, parsley, and cayenne pepper. Ingredient information is educational and uses non-medical language such as "may support," "traditionally used for," and "contains nutrients that support."

Important pages:
- Home: https://fusionhealthjuices.com/
- Menu: https://fusionhealthjuices.com/menu.html
- About: https://fusionhealthjuices.com/about.html
- Contact: https://fusionhealthjuices.com/contact.html
- Peanut Punch: https://fusionhealthjuices.com/#peanut-punch
- Ingredients: https://fusionhealthjuices.com/ingredients/peanut/
